insert.foreach:
insert into volume
project_id,
`number`,
`name`,
grade,
tec_id,
planned_publication_date,
value
#{item.pid},
#{item.number},
#{item.name },
#{item.grade},
#{item.tecId },
#{item.plannedPublicationDate}

mapper.insert:
insert into volume
`project_id`,
`number`,
`name`,
grade,
tec_id,
planned_publication_date,
professional_date,
withdrawal_date,
creator,
create_time,
values
#{pid},
#{number},
#{name},
#{grade},
#{tecId},
#{plannedPublicationDate},
#{professionalDate},
#{withdrawalDate},
#{creator},
#{creatorDate},

select id from volume where `number` = #{number}
insert ignore into volume
`project_id`,
`number`,
`name`,
grade,
tec_id,
planned_publication_date,
actual_publication_date,
professional_date,
withdrawal_date,
checker_date,
principal_date,
headman_date,
values
#{pid},
#{number},
#{volumeName},
#{grade},
#{tid},
#{plannedPublicationDate},
#{actualPublicationDate},
#{professionalDate},
#{withdrawalDate},
#{checkerCompletionDate},
#{principalCompletionDate},
#{headmanCompletionDate},
insert volume_reason(volume_id,reason,`date`) values (#{id}, #{reason}, now()) on duplicate key update reason = values(reason), `date` = values(`date`)
insert volume_workday(volume_id, `state`, workday, ratio_state) values (#{id}, #{state}, #{workday}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE workday = values(workday)
insert volume_workday_log(user_id, volume_id, `date`, workday, this_grant, `type`, `old`) values (#{userId}, #{map.id}, now(), #{map.workday}, #{map.thisGrant}, #{map.type}, #{map.old})

insert volume_workday(volume_id, `state`, workday, ratio_state, principal, designer, checker, headman) values (#{id}, #{state}, #{workday},1, #{principal}/100, #{designer}/100, #{checker}/100, #{headman}/100) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE workday = values(workday), principal = values(principal), designer = values(designer), checker = values(checker), headman = values(headman)
mapper.update: insert volume_workday_high(volume_id, `grant`,`date`) values (#{id}, #{grant}, #{date}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `grant` = values(`grant`)
mapper.select: select * from volume v LEFT JOIN (select vu.volume_id , u.name from volume_user vu, `user` u where vu.volume_id = #{id} and u.id = vu.user_id and power_id = 4 ) as designer ON v.id = designer.volume_id LEFT JOIN (select vu.volume_id , u.name from volume_user vu, `user` u where vu.volume_id = #{id} and u.id = vu.user_id and power_id = 5 ) as checker ON designer.volume_id = checker.volume_id, technology t where v.id = #{id} and t.id = v.tec_id

select.if: SELECT v.id, v.`name`, v.number, v.designer, v.checker, v.principal, v.state, v.rollId, p.general, p.`name` as projectName FROM project p, volume v WHERE p.id = v.project_id AND ( v.checker = #{user} OR v.designer = #{user} OR ( v.principal = #{user} AND v.principal NOT LIKE "%;%" ) OR (( SUBSTRING_INDEX( v.principal, "", 1 )= #{user} OR SUBSTRING_INDEX( v.principal, ";",- 1 )= #{user}) AND v.principal LIKE "%;%") OR ( p.general = #{user} AND p.general NOT LIKE "%;%" ) OR (( SUBSTRING_INDEX( p.general, "", 1 )= #{user} OR SUBSTRING_INDEX( p.general, ";",- 1 )= #{user} ) AND p.general LIKE "%;%" ) )

if.test: user != null and volume != null and user !='' and volume !=''

select.if: SELECT v.id, v.`name`, v.number, v.designer, v.checker, v.principal, v.rollId, v.state, p.general, p.`name` as projectName FROM project p, volume v WHERE p.id = v.project_id AND ( v.number like "%"#{volume}"%" or v.name like "%"#{volume}"%" )

mapper.select: SELECT pid, projectName, director, general, id, number, volumeName, dep, tec, state, principal, designer, checker, workday, planned_start_date, planned_shot_date, shot_date, proofreading_date, formId, wfInstId, rollId, planned_publication_date, actual_publication_date, complete_time, GROUP_CONCAT( role ) as role, DATE_FORMAT( planned_shot_date, "%Y-%m" ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS pid, p.NAME AS projectName, p.director, p.general, v.id AS id, v.number, v.NAME AS volumeName, v.dep, v.tec, v.state, v.principal, v.designer, v.checker, v.workday, v.planned_start_date, v.planned_shot_date, v.shot_date, v.proofreading_date, v.formId, v.wfInstId, v.rollId, v.planned_publication_date, v.actual_publication_date, v.complete_time, 1 AS role FROM project p, volume v WHERE v.project_id = p.id AND FIND_IN_SET( #{name}, REPLACE ( v.principal, ";", "," )) AND FIND_IN_SET( SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{number},"+",1), REPLACE ( v.number, "+", "," )) UNION SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS pid, p.NAME AS projectName, p.director, p.general, v.id AS id, v.number, v.NAME AS volumeName, v.dep, v.tec, v.state, v.principal, v.designer, v.checker, v.workday, v.planned_start_date, v.planned_shot_date, v.shot_date, v.proofreading_date, v.formId, v.wfInstId, v.rollId, v.planned_publication_date, v.actual_publication_date, v.complete_time, 2 AS role FROM project p, volume v WHERE v.project_id = p.id AND v.designer = #{name} AND FIND_IN_SET( SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{number},"+",1), REPLACE ( v.number, "+", "," )) union SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS pid, p.NAME AS projectName, p.director, p.general, v.id AS id, v.number, v.NAME AS volumeName, v.dep, v.tec, v.state, v.principal, v.designer, v.checker, v.workday, v.planned_start_date, v.planned_shot_date, v.shot_date, v.proofreading_date, v.formId, v.wfInstId, v.rollId, v.planned_publication_date, v.actual_publication_date, v.complete_time, 3 AS role FROM project p, volume v WHERE v.project_id = p.id AND v.checker = #{name} AND FIND_IN_SET( SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{number},"+",1), REPLACE( v.number, "+","," )) ) AS dataTable where number <> #{number} GROUP BY number
SELECT p.number as pNumber,p.`name` as pName ,v.* FROM project p, volume v WHERE p.id = v.project_id and p.spider = 0 and v.proofreading_date >= #{min} and v.proofreading_date <= #{max}

SELECT DISTINCT v.*, p.number as pNumber, p.`name` as pName FROM volume v, project p WHERE v.actual_principal = #{name} AND v.proofreading_date >= #{min} AND v.proofreading_date <= #{max} and p.id = v.project_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT v.*, p.number as pNumber, p.`name` as pName FROM volume v, project p WHERE v.designer = #{name} AND v.proofreading_date >= #{min} AND v.proofreading_date <= #{max} and p.id = v.project_id UNION SELECT DISTINCT v.*, p.number as pNumber, p.`name` as pName FROM volume v, project p WHERE v.checker = #{name} AND v.proofreading_date >= #{min} AND v.proofreading_date <= #{max} and p.id = v.project_id

SELECT id, workday, sumGrant, IFNUll(`grant`,0) as `grant`, IFNUll(workday* IFNULL( ratio, 0.6 ),0) - `grant` AS usable, IFNULL( principal, principal1 ) AS principal, IFNULL( designer, designer1 ) AS designer, IFNULL( checker, checker1 ) AS checker, IFNULL( headman, headman1 ) AS headman FROM ( SELECT v.id, w.workday, IFNUll(h.`grant`,0) as `grant`, SUM(h1.`grant`) as sumGrant, p.ratio, w.principal*100 as principal, w.designer*100 as designer, w.checker*100 as checker, w.headman*100 as headman, t.principal*100 AS principal1, t.designer*100 AS designer1, t.checker*100 AS checker1, t.headman*100 AS headman1 FROM volume v LEFT JOIN volume_workday w ON v.id = w.volume_id LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h on v.id = h.volume_id and h.date = #{date} LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h1 on v.id = h1.volume_id LEFT JOIN tec_ratio t ON v.tec = t.tec LEFT JOIN project_workday_ratio p ON v.project_id = p.project_id WHERE v.id = #{id} ) AS m

SELECT IFNULL( SUM( w.workday ), 0 ) AS used, IFNULL( wt.amount, 0 ) AS amount, v.state FROM volume v LEFT JOIN volume_workday w ON w.volume_id IN ( SELECT id FROM volume WHERE v.tec = tec AND v.project_id = project_id ), workday_tec wt WHERE v.id = #{id} AND wt.project_id = v.project_id AND v.tec = wt.volume_tec
